commands.review_summary:
The branch adds generated ACPX wrappers for built-in Claude and Gemini aliases that strip selected provider auth env vars from child harness environments, updates wrapper cleanup detection, and adds focused tests.

Reproducibility: yes. for the narrow child-env behavior: current main lacks the Gemini wrapper and upstream Gemini/Claude paths consult ambient provider env, so dummy env probes can reproduce the exposure. No live OAuth or billing drift path was run in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Not a repair-lane candidate: the remaining blocker is contributor-supplied real behavior proof for the latest commit and maintainer handling of the broader linked issue, not a narrow code defect automation can prove.
